title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Recruitment
text:
# Recruitment Filter Past Recruitment
To
Filter
Recruitment | Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| Advertisement No. F. 1(7)-DM/W/ESTT/2021/2968 dated 20.01.2021 & subsequent corrigendum dated 11.02.2021 and notification dated 16.08.2021 & 22.09.2021. | Advertisement No. F. 1(7)-DM/W/ESTT/2021/2968 dated 20.01.2021 & subsequent corrigendum dated 11.02.2021 and notification dated 16.08.2021 & 22.09.2021 for engagement to the post of District programme Officer . | 29/09/2021 | 30/10/2021 | |
| Written examination of recruitment for the post of District Programme Office (DPO). | Written examination of recruitment for the post of District Programme Office (DPO) on purely contractual and temporarily basis under DM’s office , West Tripura is scheduled to be held on 20th september,2021 at 11 AM. | 16/08/2021 | 31/08/2021 | |
| Notification of INDIAN AIR FORCE Recruitment. | Notification of INDIAN AIR FORCE Recruitment. For More Details visit www.airmenselection.cdac.in | 02/03/2021 | 15/03/2021 | |
| CORRIGENDUM for recruitment for the post of DPO under DM Office,West Tripura District. | CORRIGENDUM for recruitment for the post of District Programme Officer (DPO) on purely contractual and temporarity basis under DM’s Office,West Tripura which was supposed to close on 12-02-2021 has been extended upto 20-02-2021. | 11/02/2021 | 21/02/2021 | |
| Advertisement for the post of District Programme Officer(DPO). | Advertisement for the post of District Programme Officer(DPO) on purely contract basis and temporary basis under DM’s Office,West Tripura District for Disaster Management. | 21/01/2021 | 13/02/2021 | |
| Memo for hired Technical Assistants (TA) who were engaged on contract basis to strengthen the Census 2021 | Memo for hired Technical Assistants (TA) who were engaged on contract basis to strengthen the Census 2021 and updating of NPR are hereby discontinued w.e.f the afternoon of 31st August 2020 for the time being.
